creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: kuriyama
Date: Mon Jul 29 15:05:49 2013
New Revision: 323892
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323892

Log:
  - Update dependency.
  
  PR:		ports/180391
  Submitted by:	Anton Yuzhaninov <ayuzhaninov@openstat.ru>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/Makefile
  head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/Makefile	Mon Jul 29 15:03:58 2013	(r323891)
+++ head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/Makefile	Mon Jul 29 15:05:49 2013	(r323892)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	HTTP::Headers::Fast
-# Date created:		12 Feb 2009
-# Whom:			Jun Kuriyama <kuriyama@FreeBSD.org>
-#
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	HTTP-Headers-Fast
 PORTVERSION=	0.16
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -14,8 +10,7 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Perl extension for faster implementation of HTTP::Headers
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	\
-	p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-HTTP-Date>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTTP-Date
 BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
 TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Test-Requires>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Requires
 

Modified: head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/pkg-plist	Mon Jul 29 15:03:58 2013	(r323891)
+++ head/www/p5-HTTP-Headers-Fast/pkg-plist	Mon Jul 29 15:05:49 2013	(r323892)
@@ -1 +1,2 @@
 %%SITE_PERL%%/HTTP/Headers/Fast.pm
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/HTTP/Headers
